---
name: Feature Request
about: Suggest a new feature or improvement for TourDocs
title: "[FEATURE] "
labels: enhancement, triage
assignees: ""
---

## Problem Statement

<!-- Describe the problem or pain point this feature would solve. Use "As a [role], I want [goal] so that [benefit]" format if applicable. -->

As a **[role]**, I want **[goal]** so that **[benefit]**.

## Proposed Solution

<!-- Describe the solution you'd like. Be as specific as possible. -->

## User Experience

<!-- Describe how users would interact with this feature. Include wireframes or mockups if available. -->

### UI/UX Considerations
- Where would this feature be accessed?
- What would the workflow look like?
- Are there any accessibility considerations?

## Technical Considerations

<!-- Optional: Include any technical details or constraints you're aware of. -->

### Backend
- New endpoints needed?
- Database changes required?
- Background jobs needed?

### Frontend
- New components needed?
- State management changes?
- New routes?

## Alternatives Considered

<!-- Describe any alternative solutions or features you've considered and why they were rejected. -->

1. **Alternative A:** ...
   - Pros: ...
   - Cons: ...

2. **Alternative B:** ...
   - Pros: ...
   - Cons: ...

## Acceptance Criteria

<!-- Define the criteria that must be met for this feature to be considered complete. -->

- [ ] Criterion 1
- [ ] Criterion 2
- [ ] Criterion 3

## Priority

- [ ] Critical - Blocking other work or customer commitment
- [ ] High - Important for next release
- [ ] Medium - Nice to have, planned for future
- [ ] Low - Wishlist item

## Additional Context

<!-- Any other context, screenshots, examples from other products, or references. -->
